case_title: TAMARA VASILJEVIC VS. JACQUELINE HUYNH, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA A & D, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASILJEVIC, TAMARA AS TO DEFENDANT JACQUELINE HUYNH, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA A & D, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
